[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 110100110 5
2 001011000 3
3 000100000 1
4 000111100 4
5 010110001 4
6 011111100 6
7 001111110 6
